cases.label: well-formed-drives-state
steps: publish a well-formed event to the documented topic
poll the target resource within the documented poll window
assert the resource reaches its documented expected state within the window
record the observed state and the latency to convergence

cases.label: malformed-dead-letters
steps: publish a malformed event with exactly one required field dropped
assert the consumer ERROR-logs the malformed event
assert the event is dead-lettered within the documented deadline
re-read the target resource
assert state is unchanged
assert the consumer did not crash and remains healthy

cases.label: duplicate-applied-once
steps: publish a well-formed event
publish an exact duplicate of the same event with the same idempotency key
poll the resource
assert the idempotent consumer applied the effect exactly once
assert no double-application side effect is observed

cases.label: out-of-order-resolution
steps: publish two events for one key out of documented order
apply the documented ordering/versioning rule
assert the later/higher-version event wins or the stale event is dropped per policy
assert final state matches the documented winner

cases.label: poison-retry-then-dead-letter
steps: publish a poison message that fails processing
assert it is retried exactly the documented number of times
assert it is dead-lettered after the documented retry count is exhausted
assert it is not retried beyond the documented count
assert the consumer remains healthy
